section_name: Operation of moped on sidewalk or bicycle trail
text:
(1) A person commits the offense of operation of a moped on a sidewalk or bicycle trail if the person operates a moped upon a sidewalk, a bicycle path or a bicycle lane.

(2) Exemptions to this section are provided under ORS 811.440 (When motor vehicles may operate on bicycle lane) .

(3) The offense described in this section, operation of a moped on a sidewalk or bicycle trail, is a Class D traffic violation. [1983 c.338 §644]
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 814. Pedestrians
##### § 814.210 — Operation of moped on sidewalk or bicycle trail

(1) A person commits the offense of operation of a moped on a sidewalk or bicycle trail if the person operates a moped upon a sidewalk, a bicycle path or a bicycle lane.

(2) Exemptions to this section are provided under ORS 811.440 (When motor vehicles may operate on bicycle lane) .

(3) The offense described in this section, operation of a moped on a sidewalk or bicycle trail, is a Class D traffic violation. [1983 c.338 §644]

subsections.text: A person commits the offense of operation of a moped on a sidewalk or bicycle trail if the person operates a moped upon a sidewalk, a bicycle path or a bicycle lane.
Exemptions to this section are provided under ORS 811.440 (When motor vehicles may operate on bicycle lane) .
The offense described in this section, operation of a moped on a sidewalk or bicycle trail, is a Class D traffic violation. [1983 c.338 §644]
